title: Byo Cha Khape
overview: Sindhionism Presents Byo Cha Khape is a Sindhi comedy-drama where a harmless lie by two friends spirals into unexpected twists of romance, debt, and peril. At its heart, it's a story of friendship and the enduring belief that truth always triumphs.
